main.description: Account-level preferences for The Social Wire. This record stores non-sensitive preferences only; third-party access tokens and secrets must not be stored in ATProto repos.

readLaterService.description: The read-later provider used by the /saved surface.

readLaterConnections.description: Non-sensitive connection metadata for read-later providers. Do not store API tokens, passwords, refresh tokens, or secrets here.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this preferences record was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this preferences record was last updated.

connectedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the provider was connected.

accountLabel.description: User-visible account identifier, such as a username or email. Do not store credentials.
